rationale: Review 2's four naming findings are all minor/stylistic or contested (e.g. 'map_proj' and 'smul_eq_apply' are reasonable and parallel existing code; 'commute with' is standard deck-transformation terminology; 'applySubgroup...' maintains file-internal apply* consistency). No finding is a clear misnomer a maintainer would block on, so following either review produces an equivalent final PR.
